message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): add write-merge policy, XOR delta engine, and lifecycle expansion

Substantial expansion of the MVCC crate's write-path logic:

lifecycle.rs (+500 lines):
- WriteMergePolicy enum: Off/Safe/LabUnsafe modes controlled by
  PRAGMA fsqlite.write_merge for semantic conflict resolution
- MergePageKind: page classification (interior/leaf/overflow/freelist/
  pointer-map/opaque) for merge-safety decisions
- Intent-based merge protocol: detect non-conflicting concurrent writes
  to different btree subtrees using page-kind awareness
- Transaction lifecycle hooks for merge-eligible commit paths

core_types.rs:
- Add MergeOutcome and PageClassification types used by the merge engine
- Refine TxnState transitions for merge-aware commit protocol

xor_delta.rs (new):
- XOR-based binary delta computation for page-level change tracking
- Compact delta encoding/decoding for WAL frame deduplication
- Used by the merge engine to detect overlapping vs disjoint page edits

lib.rs:
- Wire up xor_delta module and update public re-exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
